name: Signature Espresso
description: Our house blend espresso — rich, bold, with a velvety golden crema and notes of dark chocolate and toasted hazelnut.

name: Lavender Oat Latte
description: Espresso with house-made lavender syrup and steamed oat milk — floral, creamy, and utterly soothing.

name: Classic Cappuccino
description: Equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and thick microfoam — the perfect balance of strength and silk.

name: Cold Brew Reserve
description: 24-hour steered single-origin cold brew — naturally sweet, low acid, served over crystal-clear ice.

name: Caramel Macchiato
description: Layers of vanilla-infused milk, bold espresso, and a generous drizzle of artisan caramel.

name: Flat White
description: Double ristretto shots with velvety microfoam milk — intense espresso character in every sip.

name: Ethiopian Pour-Over
description: Single-cup pour-over of Yirgacheffe beans — bright, floral, with blueberry and jasmine notes.

name: Matcha Latte
description: Ceremonial-grade Japanese matcha whisked smooth with steamed oat milk — earthy, creamy, vibrant green.

name: Jasmine Green Tea
description: Delicate loose-leaf jasmine green tea brewed with precision — light, aromatic, and refreshing.

name: Chai Spice Latte
description: House-brewed masala chai concentrate with steamed whole milk — warming spices of cinnamon, cardamom, and ginger.

name: Butter Croissant
description: Flaky, golden-laminated croissant from our partner bakery Crumble & Co. — baked fresh every morning.

name: Cardamom Knot
description: Pull-apart cardamom and brown sugar knot bun — sweet, aromatic, and dangerously addictive.

name: Blueberry Scone
description: Tender, crumbly scone loaded with fresh blueberries and finished with a vanilla glaze.

name: Dark Chocolate Brownie
description: Dense, fudgy brownie made with 70% dark chocolate — intense, rich, and pairs perfectly with espresso.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Sourdough toast with smashed avocado, chili flakes, lemon zest, and everything bagel seasoning.

name: Granola Parfait
description: Greek yogurt layered with house-made granola, seasonal berries, and a drizzle of local wildflower honey.

name: Cheese & Charcuterie Board
description: Artisan cheeses, cured meats, olives, and crackers — a small but impressive board for two.
